metadata.overview: Controls WM miners running the (hypothetical) firmware v3 HTTP JSON API. Third-party authoring demo: a plain Worker Plugin with its own SQLite persistence — no MDK worker-infra services. Hosted on WorkerRuntime by a caller (see examples/backend/demo-worker-caller), not by this package.

telemetry.name: power_mode
telemetry.description: Active power mode: eco, normal or high.

telemetry.name: history
telemetry.description: Recent telemetry samples from the worker's own SQLite store (params: { limit }).

commands.name: reboot
commands.constraints: Do not call more than once per 5 minutes.

commands.name: setPowerMode
commands.description: Changes the power mode: eco, normal or high (low is accepted as an alias for eco).

errors.ERR_BAD_POWER_MODE: The firmware rejected the requested power mode.
errors.ERR_DEVICE_CALL_FAILED: The v3 HTTP API call failed or returned an error.
